headerDisplay:
Tuya without developer account for Homebridge

This plugin uses Home Assistant-style Tuya QR Cloud Authentication. It does not ask for Tuya IoT Access ID, Access Secret, cloud project, username, or password. Open the plugin settings, enter your Tuya User Code, generate the QR code, scan it with the Tuya Smart or Smart Life app, then save.
footerDisplay: Note: If authentication is cleared or expires, generate a new QR code from this settings screen.

userCode.title: Tuya User Code
userCode.description: The User Code from the Tuya Smart or Smart Life mobile app. This is the only required cloud authentication value.

homeWhitelist.title: Home Whitelist
homeWhitelist.description: Optional. Restrict discovery to specific Tuya home IDs after authentication.

enableAdaptiveLighting.title: Enable Adaptive Lighting for eligible lights
enableAdaptiveLighting.description: Optional. Enables HomeKit Adaptive Lighting only for Tuya lights that expose both brightness and real white color-temperature controls. RGB-only lights and dimmer plugs are skipped.

deviceOverrides.title: Device Overrides
deviceOverrides.description: Optional advanced overrides. Use this only if a discovered device needs a custom category, schema mapping, or to be hidden/unbridged.

adaptiveLighting.title: Adaptive Lighting Override
adaptiveLighting.description: Optional per-device override. Use enabled=true to force-enable for this device, or enabled=false to disable it even when global Adaptive Lighting is enabled.

airConditioner.title: Air Conditioner Temperature Limits
airConditioner.description: Optional HomeKit temperature range override for Wi-Fi air conditioners. Values are always Celsius; Home app converts to Fahrenheit automatically for users using °F.

minTemperature.title: Minimum temperature (°C)
minTemperature.description: Lowest setpoint exposed to HomeKit. Common values are 16 or 17. Leave empty to use Tuya schema.

maxTemperature.title: Maximum temperature (°C)
maxTemperature.description: Highest setpoint exposed to HomeKit. Common value is 31. Leave empty to use Tuya schema.

temperatureStep.title: Temperature step (°C)
temperatureStep.description: Set to 1 to suppress 0.5 °C steps. Values are Celsius even when Home app displays Fahrenheit.

petFeeder.title: Smart Pet Feeder Options
petFeeder.description: Optional settings for Tuya pet feeders. The plugin exposes quick/manual feed switches, feed-state sensor, and battery when supported.

manualFeedAmount.title: Manual feed amount
manualFeedAmount.description: Portions sent when the Manual Feed switch is turned on.

exposeSlowFeed.title: Expose Slow Feed switch
exposeSlowFeed.description: Expose slow_feed as a HomeKit switch when the device supports it.

alarm.title: Alarm Options
alarm.description: Optional extra switches for Tuya alarm panels. The main alarm is exposed as a HomeKit Security System when master_mode is available.
